ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste a bare URL to get a formatted Markdown link automatically.
ast.target: 粘贴一个裸URL，即可自动获得格式化的Markdown链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pasted images are saved to your attachments folder with a clean name.
ast.target: 粘贴的图片会以清晰的名称保存到您的附件文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rich content from web pages is converted to clean Markdown.
ast.target: 来自网页的富文本内容会被转换为整洁的Markdown。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: YouTube urls are replaced with the video title.
ast.target: YouTube链接会被替换为视频标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tweet urls are replaced with the post title.
ast.target: 推文链接会被替换为帖子标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for pasted image filenames. Supports {YYYY}, {MM}, {DD}, {HH}, {mm}, {ss}, {YYYYMMDD-HHmmss}.
ast.target: 粘贴图片文件名的模板。支持 {YYYY}、{MM}、{DD}、{HH}、{mm}、{ss}、{YYYYMMDD-HHmmss}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove these suffixes from fetched page titles. One per line.
ast.target: 从获取的页面标题中移除这些后缀。每行一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait for a page title before falling back to default paste.
ast.target: 等待页面标题的时间，超时后将回退到默认粘贴。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your paste key just got smarter. From now on:
ast.target: 您的粘贴键变得更智能了。从现在起：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pasted urls become titled Markdown links.
ast.target: 粘贴的URL会变成带标题的Markdown链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pasted images are saved and renamed automatically.
ast.target: 粘贴的图片会自动保存并重命名。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Rich web content becomes clean Markdown.
ast.target: 丰富的网页内容会变成整洁的Markdown。

ast.name: text
ast.source: YouTube and Twitter links are replaced with their titles.
ast.target: YouTube和Twitter链接会被替换为它们的标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can disable any of this in the plugin settings tab.
ast.target: 您可以在插件设置选项卡中禁用任何这些功能。
